method_reviews.summary: The injected SNR grid spans below-threshold, follow-up, and high-interest local scheduling tiers while preserving the calibrated drift range as triage evidence rather than a detection claim.
The same recovered hit rows are suitable for the committed GLOBULAR-style HDBSCAN feature family, preserving dense-cluster RFI interpretation as a heuristic local pre-filter only.
The same recovered hit rows are suitable for the committed PCA and IsolationForest anomaly-scoring family, preserving anomaly scores as local triage aids rather than technosignature evidence.
The learned real-label model remains trained on HIP99427 labels; this closure does not claim retraining or external-label validation on the injected grid.
The injection grid uses one real-noise source target and cannot establish cross-target frequency recurrence.

negative_evidence: HIP17147 and HIP39826 held-out GBT HDF5 attempts produced zero valid turboSETI hit rows at the configured threshold.
The injection grid is synthetic augmentation in real GBT noise and does not replace independent external validation.
No candidate report, score, cluster label, or anomaly score is promoted to a detection or external-submission recommendation.
closure_conditions: At least one DECISION-133 evidence stream is populated with usable candidate rows.
At least two structurally independent method families are recorded on the same evidence stream.
Disagreements, abstentions, and negative evidence are preserved.
Raw HDF5, DAT, LOG, cache, SQLite, and generated science payloads remain uncommitted.
Production promotion is local citizen-science operations only.
conclusion: DECISION-134 is closed for local citizen-science production promotion because the review-safe evidence bundle records a populated injection-recovery stream in real GBT noise, at least two independent method-family reviews, preserved abstentions and negative evidence, and explicit non-claim guardrails. This does not claim a detection, expert review, peer review, external validation, or external-submission authorization.
